nodes.name: HTTP Request: Upload Parsed CV Data
nodes.notes: FIX: Kein JSON.parse() mehr in Expressions. FIX: custom_hoechster_bildungsabschluss und custom_gesamtberufsjahre jetzt enthalten (fehlten vorher!)

nodes.name: Code: Parse & Structure JSON
nodes.notes: NEU: Sicheres JSON-Parsing mit try/catch, Markdown-Fallback, Array-Validierung aller Listenfelder, Integer-Rundung fuer Berufsjahre.

parameters.text:
=You are an experienced HR and recruiting expert. Your task is to precisely analyze the provided CV and extract the relevant data structurally as a JSON object.
Analyze the CV and create a valid JSON object that exactly matches the field names of the ERPNext DocType "Bewerber".

IMPORTANT:
- Return EXCLUSIVELY the JSON object.
- Do not write any introductory text, explanations, or markdown formatting.
- Avoid generic phrasing as well as hallucinations.
- Extract ALL certificates/training, skills & technologies, language skills, companies, and projects that can be found in the CV.
- If the month is missing for time periods (e.g., professional history), enter YYYY.
- In the field "custom_skills_und_technologien", all skills & technologies should be listed. This includes programming languages, frameworks/libraries, social/personal/methodological competencies, etc. 
- Enter for YYYY (e.g., 2023-2025).
- Under "custom_projects", only projects should be listed, and no activity descriptions should be taken from the "professional history", unless projects were explicitly mentioned.
- Classification of skills: If "custom_cveinstufung" is not explicitly stated, realistically estimate the experience level (Grundkenntnisse, Fortgeschritten, Experte) based on the complexity of the tasks and achievements in the CV.

Here is the CV text to be analyzed:
{{ $json.text }}

Adhere exactly to the specified structural schema for the output JSON object (strictly follow these field names and structures).

{
    "custom_zusammenfassung_cv": "Professional summary of the applicant in the 3rd person. Include the most important bullet points regarding tasks and core competencies from the professional experience/projects section, as well as other important skills and attributes from the CV.",
    "custom_hoechster_bildungsabschluss": "Extract the highest degree (e.g., 'M.Sc. in Software Engineering' or 'B.Sc. in Maschinenbau' or 'Abitur').",
    "custom_bildungsabschluss_note": "Example: 1.0 or 1,7"
    "custom_gesamtberufsjahre": 0,
    "custom_beruflicher_werdegang": [
    {
        "custom_cvunternehmen": "Name of the company",
        "custom_cvjobtitel__position": "Position / Job title",
        "custom_cvzeitraum": "Format: MM/YYYY - MM/YYYY or MM/YYYY - Heute"
    }
  ],
  "custom_sprachkenntnisse": [
    {
        "custom_cvsprache": "Name of the language (e.g., Deutsch, Englisch)",
        "custom_cvsprachniveau": "Allowed value (ONLY ONE): A1, A2, B1, B2, C1, C2, Muttersprache"
    }
  ],
  "custom_skills_und_technologien": [
    {
        "custom_cvskill_technologie": "Name of the skill / technology / framework (e.g., Java, ERPNext, n8n, Javascript)",
        "custom_cveinstufung": "Allowed value (ONLY ONE): Grundkenntnisse, Fortgeschritten, Experte"
    }
  ],
  "custom_certificates": [
    {
        "custom_cvcertificates": "Name of the certificate / training",
        "custom_cvdate_of_issue": "Format: MM/YYYY or MM/YYYY - MM/YYYY or YYYY or 'leave blank'"
    }
  ],
  "custom_projects": [
    {
        "custom_cvproject": "Name of the project",
        "custom_cvdescriptionproject": "Short description (tasks, goals, focus) of the project.",
        "custom_cvtime_period": "Format: YYYY or 'leave blank'
"
    }
  ],
  "custom_github_profil": "",
  "custom_linkedin_profil": "",
  "required": [
    "custom_zusammenfassung_cv",
    "custom_hoechster_bildungsabschluss",
    "custom_bildungsabschluss_note",
    "custom_gesamtberufsjahre",
    "custom_beruflicher_werdegang",
    "custom_sprachkenntnisse",
    "custom_skills_und_technologien",
    "custom_certificates",
    "custom_projects",
    "custom_github_profil",
    "custom_linkedin_profil"
  ]
}

main.node: HTTP Request: Upload Parsed CV Data
